response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with roughly 15 years of experience across web, mobile, and high-throughput backend systems, but the profile does not match a Principal/IC6 role centered on experimentation and growth systems. There is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis workflows, and no demonstrated multi-team, multi-workstream technical leadership at platform scale. Recent roles are product-focused senior IC positions rather than org-level systems ownership.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured engineering experience across many stacks (TypeScript/Node, C/C++, D, Java)
High-scale, low-latency systems exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests per second)
Strong engineering-quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, open-source authorship, teaching and mentoring via workshops
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience
No evidence of Principal-level scope: leading multi-team initiatives or platforms adopted across an organization
Limited telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical analysis background required by the role

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Principal/IC6 platform-leadership expectations
Solid fundamentals and scale experience in production systems
